name: adlc
description: Agentic Development Life Cycle harness. A persistent Obsidian wiki as the knowledge substrate (Karpathy LLM-wiki pattern, OKF-aligned), an optional structural code graph (via graphify), role skills for BA / product / architecture work, and a plan-driven delivery loop that dispatches build / test / review / verify workers story by story. AGENTS.md project profiling calibrates the harness to each repo. Formerly claude-mem.
